## Change

Describe the user-visible or operational outcome and the risk boundary touched.

## Evidence

- [ ] Regression/contract test added or updated
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm verify:release` for release, desktop, persistence, security, or workflow changes
- [ ] Documentation and changelog claims reconciled
- [ ] No secrets, runtime databases, private prompts/chats, generated bundles, or local evidence committed

List exact commands, results, and any intentionally skipped platform/hosted gate.
